To our valued customers.

The Sampling Lounge and Museum at our St James's Street store will be closed for refurbishment from Monday 20th April until Thursday 7th May. Our store will be open as usual, and our Sampling Lounge at Harrods remains open.

 We apologise for the inconvenience caused.

    Hoyo de Monterrey Cigars

    Established in the 1850s by José Gener, who emigrated to Cuba from Spain in 1831, the Hoyo de Monterrey brand produces many vitola in Cuba for Habanos SA. Once the cigar brand gained popularity, Gener registered the name Hoyo de Monterrey, which translates as ‘Hole of Monterrey’. Many experts believe this was in reference to the favourable concave terrain for growing tobacco within this area.

    The Hoyo de Monterrey brand has grown to be incredibly popular since its inception, with a large proportion of its market being from Britain. After Gener’s passing in 1900, the company was passed down to his daughter, Lutgarda Gener, and it remained a family business for a further three decades.

    Eventually, the Gener family decided to focus on their sugarcane plants and, in doing so, sold the cigar brand. After the Cuban revolution in 1959, Hoyo de Monterrey was acquired by the Villazon family.

    The James J. Fox Hoyo de Monterrey Collection

    Take advantage of browsing James J. Fox’s extensive collection of Hoyo de Monterrey cigars to find a selection of great new flavours to try. Incredibly popular for their unique tobacco blend, these cigars are sure to deliver a punchy, yet flavoursome, experience to your palate.

    Arguably one of the most advocated cigars within the Hoyo de Monterrey collection is the Epicure No. 2. Thanks to its rich and complex variety of flavours, this medium strength robusto does not go unappreciated, Experience indulgent sweet notes alongside light tannin undertones that transition into a pepper and earth-like finish.

    A perfect choice for beginners is the Double Coronas. At a light strength and 7⅝” length combined with a 49-ring gauge, you will be able to take full advantage of this oily, rich flavoured Cuban cigar. Bask in the spice, honey and chocolate mix that exudes from this cigar, complemented by contrasting wood and leather undertones.

    Enquiries

    With such a wide array of Hoyo de Monterrey cigars for you to choose from within the James J. Fox collection, we are certain that everyone from the novice to the connoisseur will appreciate this brand and its selection of vitolas.

    With over 200 years’ experience dealing in the cigar trade, James J. Fox is your first port of call for Hoyo de Monterrey cigars. Our experienced and friendly team, both online and in store, are committed towards assisting you find the perfect smoke.

    If you would like to get in touch with us, you can do so today by phone on 0207 930 3787, by emailing us at freddie@jjfox.co.uk, or by filling out our online contact form.
